task.description: Implement complete CRUD operations for ingredients view in chocolate-lab-web

userRequirements.dataPersistence: Export/import only (no local storage, no backend)
userRequirements.editScope: All ingredient properties can be edited in mutable collections

collectionTypes.mutable: Full edit capability for all properties (including protected/encrypted mutable collections)
collectionTypes.immutable: Read-only, but users can copy ingredients to mutable collections

userRequirements.keyDistinction: Protected/encrypted does NOT mean immutable. A collection can be both protected AND mutable.
featuresNeeded: Edit ingredients (all properties) in mutable collections
Add new ingredients to mutable collections
Copy ingredients from immutable collections to mutable collections

currentState.ingredientsView: Read-only browse and detail views implemented
currentState.context: ChocolateContext provides runtime access to ingredients library
currentState.collections: Tracked with metadata including isProtected, isUnlocked, isLoaded

codebaseAnalysis.similarImplementation: Fillings tool provides similar pattern to follow
